faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Does Alacaat Hotel offer free cancellation for a full refund?
faq.a1: Yes. Alacaat Hotel offers fully refundable rooms that can be booked on our site. If you've booked a fully refundable room, this reservation can be canceled up to a few days before check-in depending on the property's cancellation policy. Just make sure to check this property's cancellation policy for the exact terms and conditions.
faq.q2: Is there a pool at Alacaat Hotel?
faq.a2: Yes, there is an outdoor pool.
faq.q4: Does Alacaat Hotel offer parking on site?
faq.q5: Does Alacaat Hotel offer an airport shuttle?
faq.a5: Yes, an airport shuttle is available. A fee of 10 EUR per person, one-way, applies.
faq.q6: What are the check-in and check-out times at Alacaat Hotel?
faq.a6: You can check in from 14:00 onwards. Check-out time is noon. Fast, contactless check-in and check-out are available.
faq.q7: What are the amenities at and near Alacaat Hotel?
faq.a7: Alacaat Hotel features an outdoor pool and a garden.
faq.q8: Is there a restaurant at or near Alacaat Hotel?
faq.a8: Yes, there is a restaurant on site.
faq.q9: What is the area around Alacaat Hotel like?
faq.a9: Alacaat Hotel is a 13-minute walk from Alaçatı Bazaar and an 8-minute walk from Alaçatı Saturday Market.

guide.description: From the wind of surfing to the silence of history, a different story is hidden in every corner of Alaçatı. Which is your route?
guide.empty: This story hasn't been written yet...

historicalPlaces.title: Historic Alaçatı Windmills
historicalPlaces.description: Alaçatı's signature reaching to the sky. Transforming wind into abundance for over 150 years, these structures offer a unique terrace for sunset.
historicalPlaces.details: These windmills, which are the most elegant examples of stonemasonry, were formerly used to grind wheat. Today, they welcome guests as the most iconic structures forming the silhouette of Alaçatı.
historicalPlaces.visitor_tip: Entrance is free. The ideal time for photography is 30 minutes before sunset.

historicalPlaces.title: Pazaryeri Mosque
historicalPlaces.description: Converted from an old Greek church to a mosque, this structure is a symbol of tolerance and multiculturalism with its preserved iconographies.
historicalPlaces.details: Originally built as Ayios Konstantinos Church, the structure today still carries traces of both Christian and Islamic culture under the same roof, standing as a rare example of tolerance in the world.
historicalPlaces.visitor_tip: Pay attention to the pebble mosaic work called 'podima' in the courtyard.

historicalPlaces.title: Çeşme Castle
historicalPlaces.description: Built during the reign of Bayezid II, the castle witnesses history today with its museum and unique harbor view.
historicalPlaces.details: One of the most robust castle structures of Ottoman architecture, Çeşme Castle sheds light on the region's thousands of years of history with the archaeology museum located inside.
historicalPlaces.visitor_tip: Museum card is valid. Do not forget to watch Chios Island from the highest bastions of the castle.

historicalPlaces.title: Çeşme Clock Tower
historicalPlaces.description: A 19th-century Ottoman clock tower holding the pulse of history in the heart of Çeşme.
historicalPlaces.details: Built in 1901, the clock tower is not only a symbol of the city but also offers an atmosphere unique to Çeşme with its surrounding bazaar and vibrant marketplace.
historicalPlaces.visitor_tip: Explore the surrounding streets to visit traditional jewelry and Çeşme pepper shops.

sports.title: Windsurfing
sports.description: One of the best surfing spots in the world. It is the center for adrenaline enthusiasts with its shallow water and continuous wind blowing 300 days a year.
sports.details: Introducing Alaçatı to the world, the surf bay is not only for professionals but also one of the safest training areas in the world for beginners with its shallow and waveless structure.

sports.title: Kitesurfing
sports.description: A high-adrenaline Aegean experience where you will feel the sky and the sea at the same time.
sports.details: Alaçatı winds also create a perfect environment for kitesurfing. You can make your first flight accompanied by experienced instructors.

beaches.title: Ilıca Beach
beaches.description: Its water is warm and healing thanks to the thermal springs emerging from the sea. It is famous for its turquoise shallow water reminiscent of the Maldives.
beaches.details: What makes Ilıca special are the hot thermal waters boiling from the seabed. This feature turns the beach into a natural SPA center rather than just a sunbathing spot.

beaches.title: Altınkum Beach
beaches.description: Named after its golden yellow sands, the beach is a refreshing stop in the summer heat with its cool water and structure closed to northern winds.
beaches.details: Having one of the coldest but clearest waters of the Aegean, Altınkum has a water so transparent that you can see every single grain of sand on the seabed.

beaches.title: Delikli Bay
beaches.description: A virgin natural wonder, away from the crowds, famous for its white cliffs eroded by waves and its natural bridge.
beaches.details: Taking its name from the natural gap between the rocks, the bay gives its guests the feeling of being on a completely different planet with its pure white limestone structure. It is a completely natural and non-commercial area.

beaches.title: Akkum Beach
beaches.description: A favorite of families with its shallow turquoise waters; the epitome of peace with its pure white sand and calm gulf structure.
beaches.details: One of the calmest and most natural beaches of Çeşme. It is ideal for swimming with its fine sandy beach that is not stony.

beaches.title: Boyalık Beach
beaches.description: An active beach ideal for a daily sea holiday with its proximity to Çeşme city center and clear waters.
beaches.details: Boyalık has a complete beach infrastructure with sunbed and umbrella rental facilities, cafes, and restaurants.

gourmet.title: Hacı Memiş Cuisine
gourmet.description: The real flavor stop of Alaçatı. You can find modern gourmet interpretations of local herbs and traditional Aegean recipes.
gourmet.details: Hidden among antique shops and art galleries, Hacı Memiş is the most intimate point where you can get away from the crowd of Alaçatı and touch real Aegean cuisine.
gourmet.visitor_tip: Be sure to try Stuffed Zucchini Flowers and Şevketi Bostan.

gourmet.title: Agrilia Restaurant
gourmet.description: The freshest seafood of the Aegean and authentic Greek-Turkish culinary synthesis in the elegant atmosphere of Alaçatı.
gourmet.details: Hidden inside a stone building, Agrilia is one of the most romantic restaurants in Alaçatı with its blue-covered tables and garden lighting.

gourmet.title: Asma Yaprağı
gourmet.description: The sincerity of a village table among ivy-covered stone walls; the place that brings the spirit of the Aegean to the plate.
gourmet.details: A perfect address for those looking for real Aegean flavors with zucchini flowers, artichoke in olive oil, and homemade desserts.

gourmet.title: Tike Restaurant
gourmet.description: The address for meat lovers. Alaçatı's most acclaimed meat restaurant with its barbecue mastery and quality ingredient selection.
gourmet.details: Cooking fresh meat from the butcher on the grill, Tike conquers palates with meatballs, lamb chops, and shish kebab.

gourmet.title: Biberiye Restaurant
gourmet.description: One of the most elegant and refined restaurants in Alaçatı with its flowered courtyard and menu inspired by Aegean herbs.
gourmet.details: With its seasonal ingredients and creative presentation philosophy, Biberiye is the first stop for those seeking a fine dining experience in Alaçatı.

gourmet.title: Dalyan Marina Restaurants
gourmet.description: Fresh fish and seafood with a view of the marina; Çeşme's favorite coastal restaurants are lined up here.
gourmet.details: The coastal restaurants in Dalyan are a perfect place to relieve the tiredness of the day; especially during sunset hours.

activities.title: Çeşme Marina
activities.description: Ranking among the most prestigious marinas in Turkey, Çeşme Marina offers everything from yacht tours to a vibrant bazaar.
activities.details: The walking path along the marina is the best way to spend a pleasant evening with its boutique shops, cafes, and sunset view.

activities.title: Alaçatı Port
activities.description: The entertainment center of Alaçatı with surf schools, beach bars, and music festivals — surf by day, party by night.
activities.details: The Alaçatı Herb Festival and surf competitions held every summer take place here. It is the ideal point to feel the dynamic and young energy of Alaçatı.

detail.weather_tip: It's a perfect day to visit.
detail.hotel_recommendation: As AlacaAt Alaçatı Hotel, we recommend this route.
